headline: US hits Iran for a 5th straight day, reimposes Hormuz naval blockade
gist: US Central Command struck Iranian missile/defence sites near the Strait of Hormuz for a 5th straight day and reinstated its naval blockade; Iran's Revolutionary Guard threatened to halt all Mideast energy exports.

headline: RBI approves Rajiv Kumar as HDFC Bank Part-Time Chairman
gist: RBI approved Rajiv Kumar as HDFC Bank's Part-Time Chairman for 3 years, effective July 15.

headline: GIFT Nifty opens only mildly higher amid crude/rupee/Mideast overhang
gist: GIFT Nifty opened only mildly higher as elevated crude, a weak rupee and Mideast tensions cap near-term upside despite firm US/Asian cues.

headline: EIA storage surplus widens, Freeport LNG maintenance pressures Henry Hub
gist: EIA storage surplus widened (+61 Bcf) and Freeport LNG maintenance is cutting export flows, keeping Henry Hub pressured near 2-month lows.

headline: Gold eases toward $4,000 as safe-haven bids fade, Fed split 9-8
gist: Gold eased back toward $4,000 as Mideast safe-haven bids fade; the Fed held rates at 3.50-3.75% with the committee split 9-8 on a further hike.
